title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾风格为特色。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或云部署，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform
native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能使用和构建 AI，提供工具以帮助用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，旨在帮助用户快速启动和运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
ollama/ollama

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 库的 Stable Diffusion 网页界面，提供了图像生成、编辑等功能，支持多种模型和扩展。
highlights: 提供直观的网页界面，方便用户使用 Stable Diffusion 模型生成图像
支持多种模型和扩展，功能丰富
开源项目，社区活跃，持续更新

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
summary: f/prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让用户分享、发现和收集来自社区的提示词，支持自托管以保护隐私。
highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.
Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: huggingface/transformers
content: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
summary: Transformers 是一个用于文本、视觉、音频和多模态模型的最先进机器学习模型定义框架，支持推理和训练。
highlights: state-of-the-art machine learning models
text, vision, audio, and multimodal models
for both inference and training

title: DeepSeek-V4-Flash means LLM steering is interesting again
summary: 文章讨论了DeepSeek-V4-Flash模型如何重新激发了对LLM引导（steering）技术的兴趣，并提供了相关评论链接。
highlights: DeepSeek-V4-Flash means LLM steering is interesting again

title: Autonomous AI research for nanogpt speedrun
summary: 文章介绍了Prime Intellect在nanogpt speedrun项目中利用自主AI研究的方法和成果，展示了自动化机器学习在模型优化中的应用。
highlights: Autonomous AI research for nanogpt speedrun
Prime Intellect的自动化方法在模型训练中取得显著进展

title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
content: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.
summary: OpenAI与马耳他合作，向所有公民提供ChatGPT Plus和培训，以扩大AI访问、培养实用AI技能并促进负责任使用。
highlights: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access
offering ChatGPT Plus and training
help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly

title: How business operations teams use Codex
content: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
summary: 本文介绍了业务运营团队如何利用Codex从实际工作输入中创建倡议简报、战略更新、领导决策包和进度更新等文档。
highlights: 业务运营团队可以使用Codex创建倡议简报、战略更新、领导决策包和进度更新。
Codex能够从实际工作输入中自动生成文档。

title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
summary: IBM发布Granite Embedding Multilingual R2模型，采用Apache 2.0开源协议，支持32K上下文长度，在子1亿参数规模的多语言嵌入模型中达到最优检索质量。
highlights: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings
32K Context
Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality

title: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
summary: 本文探讨了在连续批处理中实现异步性的方法，旨在提高推理系统的吞吐量和效率。
highlights: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
提高推理系统的吞吐量和效率
